sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75224" key="o)rniqogenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνῑθο-γενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n75224.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρνιθόγονος</ref> </xr>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ ὀ.</foreign> the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bird kind,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
